acceptance_criteria.statement: Reviewer can verify: The promoted slice records decisions, options, rationale, evidence, and owners without claiming review triggers or supersession/conflict relations as materialized behavior.

value.reason: Accepted decisions require owner, rationale, and evidence references before they can be recorded. The residual risk remains visible in review but is accepted for this candidate preview.

candidate_gap_resolutions.statement: A decision without rationale can be reused later as if it were fully justified.

nodes.description: Build a Team Decision Log slice that records decisions, options, rationale, evidence, and owners.

requirements.statement: The promoted slice records decisions, options, rationale, evidence, and owners without claiming review triggers or supersession/conflict relations as materialized behavior.

nodes.title: Accept Decision

acceptance_criteria.statement: Reviewer can verify: An accepted decision needs an owner, rationale, and evidence reference.

value.mechanism: The accept-decision command validates owner, rationale, and evidence reference fields before Decision Accepted can be recorded.

candidate_gap_resolutions.statement: Define the exact enforcement mechanism for this constraint.

nodes.description: An accepted decision needs an owner, rationale, and evidence reference.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Reviewer can verify: The product must enforce `Accepted Decision Completeness`.

value.mechanism: The Accepted Decision Completeness policy gates the Decision Accepted event on complete owner, rationale, evidence reference, and reviewed option context.

candidate_gap_resolutions.statement: Define the exact enforcement mechanism for this policy.
